description: The Hudson Dusters were a New York City street gang formed in the late 1890s by Circular Jack, Kid Yorke, and Goo Goo Knox. Based in Manhattan's West Side, they controlled the Hudson River docks and engaged in burglary, armed robbery, and narcotics. The gang had ties to Tammany Hall and was known for cocaine-fueled violence. They were active until around 1917.
